mapper.select: SELECT id, permission_key as permissionKey, permission_name as permissionName, permission_type as permissionType, parent_id as parentId, path, icon, sort_order as sortOrder, status, description, create_time as createTime FROM permission WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_key as permissionKey, p.permission_name as permissionName, p.permission_type as permissionType, p.parent_id as parentId, p.path, p.icon, p.sort_order as sortOrder, p.status, p.description, p.create_time as createTime FROM permission p INNER JOIN admin_permission ap ON p.id = ap.permission_id WHERE ap.admin_id = #{adminId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC

SELECT id, permission_key as permissionKey, permission_name as permissionName, permission_type as permissionType, parent_id as parentId, path, icon, sort_order as sortOrder, status, description, create_time as createTime FROM permission WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permission (permission_key, permission_name, permission_type, parent_id, path, icon, sort_order, status, description) VALUES (#{permissionKey}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionType}, #{parentId}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{description})
